ArtifactMetadata.Summary: Removed query-level orderBy constraints on deliveries, payments, and notifications collections to bypass the Firestore composite indexes requirement. Replaced them with client-side in-memory sorting.

Description: Bypass the Firestore composite index requirements by removing orderBy from queries and sorting notifications and payments in-memory in app-store.ts.
Instruction: Remove orderBy calls from queries in app-store.ts and add client-side sorting.
